Fandom: Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Isekai Seikatsu
Rating: Teen And Up Audiences
Archive Warning: No Archive Warnings Apply
Category: Gen
Language: English

Summary: A sample test file.

Chapter 1: Chapter 1: Greetings

Subaru Natsuki woke up in a strange world with no idea how he got there. He looked around at the cobblestone streets and medieval buildings.

"Where am I?" he muttered to himself.

A young woman with silver hair approached him. She had amethyst eyes and wore a white dress.

"Hello," she said. "Are you lost?"

Subaru blinked. "I... I think so?"

The woman smiled gently. "My name is Emilia. Welcome to the capital of Lugunica."

Subaru didn't know it yet, but this was the beginning of a long and painful journey.

Chapter 2: Chapter 2: Watching From Zero

Emilia led Subaru through the streets of the capital. They passed by market stalls and street vendors selling various goods.

"So you really don't remember anything?" Emilia asked.

"Not a thing," Subaru replied. "One moment I was in my room, and the next..."

"That must be frightening," Emilia said softly.

They stopped in front of a large fountain in the central plaza. Subaru sat down on the edge and sighed.

"I'll figure this out," he said. "I always do."

Emilia sat beside him. "If you need help, you can count on me."

Subaru felt a warmth in his chest. Maybe this world wasn't so bad after all.

Chapter 3: Chapter 3: The Silver-Haired Girl

Days passed and Subaru learned more about this world. Magic was real, and so were spirits. He met a young girl named Beatrice who guarded a library, and a large man named Roswaal who was the court mage.

"Barusu, you're hopeless," said a pink-haired maid named Ram.

"Hey, I'm trying!" Subaru protested.

Her sister Rem stood nearby, quietly observing. "Subaru-kun works very hard," Rem said softly.

"Don't encourage him," Ram replied flatly.

Subaru laughed despite himself. These people were strange, but they were becoming his friends.

Chapter 4: Chapter 4: The Capital of Lugunica

The capital city was vast and beautiful. Subaru spent his days exploring its many districts and learning about its history.

One day, he encountered a knight with brilliant red hair. The man was surrounded by an aura of power.

"You must be Subaru Natsuki," the knight said. "I am Reinhard van Astrea."

"Nice to meet you," Subaru said, extending his hand.

Reinhard shook it firmly. "I've heard much about you. Emilia has spoken highly of your courage."

Subaru felt proud. He was making a name for himself in this strange new world.

Chapter 5: Chapter 5: The Witch of Envy

But not everything was peaceful. Subaru soon learned of the Witch of Envy, a terrible being that haunted the land.

"They say she appears in the shadows," a merchant whispered. "Beware the mist that comes at midnight."

Subaru shivered. He had seen things in the darkness since arriving here. Horrible things that made his blood run cold.

"I have to be strong," he told himself. "For Emilia. For everyone."

He didn't know that his journey was only beginning, and that death would become his constant companion.
